22.reason: Missing handling for equal case; should be else (go right) to include duplicates.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 1.0 , reason:  Missing handling for equal case; should be else (go right) to include duplicates.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 1.0 , reason:  Should be <= to handle equal values (right child)
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 1.0 , reason:  The condition misses the case when p->num == n. According to the problem, right child >= root, so equal values should be inserted into the right subtree. Change to `else` or `else if(p->num <= n)`.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.5 , reason:  Logical error: misses the case p->num == n. The problem specifies right child >= root, so duplicates should be inserted to the right. Change to `else {` or `else if(p->num <= n)`.

45.reason: Compilation error in C89/C90 standard: declaring loop variable `i` inside the `for` statement is not allowed. Declare `int i;` before the loop.

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.5 , reason:  Compilation error in C89/C90 standard: declaring loop variable `i` inside the `for` statement is not allowed. Declare `int i;` before the loop.
